Deliver Us from Evil (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,577,122Details
International Box Office $57,379,496
Worldwide Box Office $87,956,618
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,390,243
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,556,223
Total $4,946,466
Further financial details...

Synopsis

New York police officer Ralph Sarchie, struggling with his own personal issues, begins investigating a series of disturbing and inexplicable crimes. He joins forces with an unconventional priest, schooled in the rituals of exorcism, to combat the frightening and demonic possessions that are terrorizing their city.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,740,471 (31.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,049 opening theaters/3,049 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,761,616

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Trinidad)
July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Sweden)
July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Indonesia)
July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Jamaica)
July 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: October 28th, 2014 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence, grisly images, terror throughout, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2326, 6/11/2014)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Plot point: NYPD, Police Procedural, Possessed, Religious
Social setting: Supernatural
Source material: Based on an UNTRUE Story
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Jerry Bruckheimer Films, LStar Capital
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
